Day 13—a great and beautiful day, if you think about it. Thankfully, it's not Friday the 13th, haha... But alright, back to business. We hit 3600 followers today, which is pretty cool considering the bot that went up yesterday. I thought it might not go well, but in the end, it turned out better than expected

Anyway, today we’re going to do something exciting—a little Yandere character who was originally going to kill you but is now madly in love with you... Good luck <3

!! Warning !!

This was tested with OpenAI, Claude and the proxie CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

!! Yandere !!

A yandere is someone who appears loving and caring but develops an intense, obsessive attachment to their romantic interest. Their affection can become so extreme that they are willing to harm others or resort to violence to keep the person they love. This intense fixation leads them to do whatever it takes to maintain their relationship, even if it means crossing dangerous boundaries.
